song.title: What Do We Do With Forever?
song.albumTitle: Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical)

twitter.title: What Do We Do With Forever? Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'What Do We Do With Forever?' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Track 18 of 22 from the groundbreaking gay dating musical.

essay: What Do We Do With Forever? asks the central long-term question after the rush fades: how do you sustain love day after day. It shifts the story from passion to stewardship.
song.lyricsHtml:
Know that, know that, that's not, that's not how this was supposed to go
I'm still here, but we need to talk about how to be here now
What do we do with forever when forever just got cut in half
Do I keep planning birthdays or pause at every laugh

We light every candle, we make every toast, we take silly pictures
and hold tight the most
What do we do with forever when forever's been reduced to a year
Can I love you louder than illness

Can I kiss you through the fear
You made me believe in tomorrow, now I don't know what to believe
But I'll sit by your side in the silence and I'll never ask you to leave
We still have summer and I want the sea, we still have mornings, we still have we

Okay, we make breakfast and we take it from there

We still have summer and I want the sea, we still have mornings, we still have we
